audit_items.proof_trace: Race condition between cleanup and access. SharedObject::clearPtr() in cleanup sets rootSingleton=NULL and calls removeRef(), while concurrent getRoot() can dereference rootSingleton->tailoring without synchronization protection.
audit_items.attack_scenario: During library shutdown, cleanup thread calls uprv_collation_root_cleanup() while another thread calls getRoot(), causing null pointer dereference or use-after-free.
